svg.text: McCzarny recently focused heavily on the
crater-js game, making significant progress on
core mechanics and user interface. He
introduced a new "essence" stat for characters,
unifying interfaces and implementing direct
absorption. Item management was enhanced with
functionality for dropping items and a robust
tooltip system for both inventory and ground
items. The world generation process was
refactored, utilizing a WorldGenerator with a
staged pipeline for terrain, caves, and
boulders, and queuing items for spawning.
Character abilities received updates including
vine growth validation, ensuring other actions
stop upon activation, and a visual HUD
indicator for active abilities. He also
implemented a diagonal digging mechanic,
falling boulders, and refined health, stamina,
and patience stats. Technical improvements
included a comprehensive type cleanup across
the project and a full migration to TypeScript.
McCzarny also updated various visuals,
including tile textures, icons, and the HUD.
Generated on: Sun Apr 5 02:55:27 2026
